student_marks = [85, 90, 78, 92, 88]
total = 0
number_of_values = len(student_marks)

for counter in range(number_of_values):
    total += student_marks[counter]

average = total / number_of_values
print(f"Average: {average}")

pass_count = 0
loop_limit = 10
for counter in range(1, loop_limit + 1):
    value = int(input("Enter a value: "))  # Example input
    if value > 5:  # Example condition
        pass_count += 1

print(f"Pass count: {pass_count}")

for counter in range(1, 11):  # Loop from 1 to 10
    print(counter)
# Watch example for loops at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5QS1_QaB4Mw

array = [3, 1, 4, 1, 5, 9, 2, 6, 5, 3, 5]
maximum_value = array[0]
minimum_value = array[0]
loop_limit = len(array)

for counter in range(1, loop_limit):
    if array[counter] > maximum_value:
        maximum_value = array[counter]
    if array[counter] < minimum_value:
        minimum_value = array[counter]

print(f"Maximum value: {maximum_value}")
print(f"Minimum value: {minimum_value}")

total = 0
loop_limit = 10
for counter in range(1, loop_limit + 1):
    value_to_be_totalled = counter  # Example value
    total += value_to_be_totalled

print(f"Total: {total}")
